issue_body_preview:
Fixes #1332

Here is how you can do it inside the app:
1. open the peak: https://openclimbing.org/node/1468548654
2. click "Edit place" button
3. add tag `climbing=crag` in the Tags section - observe the type changed to "▲ Climbing crag"
4. find the "Climbing routes" section and click "Convert
test_description_zh: 打开一个 peak 类型的节点编辑对话框，在标签区域添加 climbing=crag 标签使类型变为 Climbing crag，然后找到 Climbing routes 部分并点击 Convert to relation 按钮，观察编辑对话框中原有的 peak 相关标签和数据是否仍然保留
expected_result_zh: 点击 Convert to relation 按钮后，原有节点的标签数据（如 peak 相关的标签）应该被完整保留，不应被删除或丢失，编辑对话框中应正确显示转换后的 relation 结构同时保留原有属性
